headline: Stephens & Co. Reiterates Overweight on Generac Holdings, Maintains $290 Price Target
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Tommy Moll   reiterates Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) with a Overweight and maintains $290 price target.
